title: CTAB DNA Extraction Protocol for Fungi
author: Erin Carr
materials: Obtain liquid nitrogen placed in Dewar
Re-suspend pellet in 350 µL of 5M NaCl

steps.title: Grow fungi in preferred media type...
steps.instruction: Grow fungi in preferred media type till fungi are in mid-exponential phase

steps.title: Centrifuge fungal samples at 10,000x g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge fungal samples at 10,000x g for 1 minute and wash with water 3 times, centrifuging in between, then obtain as tight of a fungal pellet as possible and remove all liquid from the tube.

steps.title: Grow fungi on preferred media type...
steps.instruction: Grow fungi on preferred media type till fungi grows to its maximum on the plate

steps.title: Place 800µL of water in a 1
steps.instruction: Place 800µL of water in a 1.5mL tube and weigh recording the weight

steps.title: Scrape 0
steps.instruction: Scrape 0.03g of fungus off the plate and place into the tube, avoiding agar

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000x for 1 minute...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000x for 1 minute to obtain a fungal pellet and remove all water

steps.title: Grab as many mortar and pestles...
steps.instruction: Grab as many mortar and pestles as necessary for the number of samples you have (or wash one out thoroughly with 70% ethanol between samples)

steps.title: Place tubes with processed fungi in...
steps.instruction: Place tubes with processed fungi in a small container and pour liquid nitrogen over the tubes until the fungi pellets are frozen completely

steps.title: With tube lids closed, tap the...
steps.instruction: With tube lids closed, tap the lids against the table to dislodge the pellet from the tube

steps.title: Put the frozen fungal pellet into...
steps.instruction: Put the frozen fungal pellet into the mortar and pour additional sterile Liquid nitrogen over the pellet

steps.title: Carefully grind the fungus being sure...
steps.instruction: Carefully grind the fungus being sure not to launch it out of the mortar, grind till the fungus is a powder, adding more liquid nitrogen if the fungus gets too liquidy

steps.title: Scrape ground up fungus out of...
steps.instruction: Scrape ground up fungus out of the mortar and place in a fresh 1.5mL tube, place sample in -80° C freezer until ready for DNA extraction.

steps.title: Grow fungi in preferred media type...
steps.instruction: Grow fungi in preferred media type till fungi are in mid-exponential phase (3-7 days)

steps.title: Pipette 1 mL of fungus into a 1
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 mL of fungus into a 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Centrifuge fungal samples at 10,000x g for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge fungal samples at 10,000x g for 1 minute

steps.title: Wash with 1 mL of ddH2O...
steps.instruction: Wash with 1 mL of ddH2O 3 times, centrifuging in between, then obtain as tight of a fungal pellet as possible and remove all liquid from the tube

steps.title: Take your 1
steps.instruction: Take your 1.5 mL tube of washed cell pellet and place in liquid nitrogen to flash freeze and place tubes in -80 freezer till you’re ready to extract DNA

steps.title: Turn on water bath/heat block to 70° C
steps.instruction: Turn on water bath/heat block to 70° C

steps.title: Determine the number of samples you...
steps.instruction: Determine the number of samples you will be processing, multiply that number by 750 µL to determine the amount of CTAB Extraction buffer you will need (700 µL per sample) and aliquot that out into a 15 mL centrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 1% w/v PVP (
steps.instruction: Add 1% w/v PVP (.01g/mL) and 1% v/v 20mg/mL Proteinase K (5µL/500µL) to your aliquoted CTAB Extraction buffer

steps.title: Grab as many bead beating tubes as you have samples
steps.instruction: Grab as many bead beating tubes as you have samples

steps.title: Pour ~300uL of glass beads into...
steps.instruction: Pour ~300uL of glass beads into tubes and label tubes accordingly

steps.title: Remove tubes of frozen fungus from the freezer
steps.instruction: Remove tubes of frozen fungus from the freezer

steps.title: Dislodge pellet from bottom of tube...
steps.instruction: Dislodge pellet from bottom of tube by pipetting 700 µL of the complete CTAB Extraction buffer into each frozen sample tube

steps.title: Transfer sample in CTAB Extraction buffer to Bead beating tube
steps.instruction: Transfer sample in CTAB Extraction buffer to Bead beating tube

steps.title: Put tubes in 70 °C water...
steps.instruction: Put tubes in 70 °C water bath or heat block for 5 minutes, then bead beat for 5 minutes; repeat 2 more times (30 mins total) (change temperature of heat block/water bath to 37° C after this step, unless you have a 37° C incubator)

steps.title: Confirm cells have lysed via microscopy,...
steps.instruction: Confirm cells have lysed via microscopy, 5 µL of sample onto a microscope slide. If cells have not lysed, bead beat for additional 2-5 minutes.

steps.title: Remove tubes from the water bath/heat...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from the water bath/heat block and transfer as much liquid as possible into a new 2 mL microcentrifuge tube, avoiding the glass beads

steps.title: Add 1x the volume of 24:1...
steps.instruction: Add 1x the volume of 24:1 Chloroform: Isoamyl to the tubes, invert tubes to mix and then centrifuge tubes at 10,000x g for 5 minutes

steps.title: Carefully remove tubes from centrifuge, collect...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove tubes from centrifuge, collect upper layer only, and transfer the upper layer into a new 2 mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 2 volumes of CTAB Precipitation...
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes of CTAB Precipitation buffer to the tubes and mix by inverting for 2 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes at 13,000x g for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes at 13,000x g for 15 minutes

steps.title: Remove supernatant, being sure to leave...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant, being sure to leave the pellet behind in the tube

steps.title: Add 2µL of 10 mg/mL RNase...
steps.instruction: Add 2µL of 10 mg/mL RNase A to tubes and place tubes at 37° C for 30 minutes

steps.title: Remove tubes from 37° C and...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from 37° C and add one volume of 24:1 Chloroform: Isoamyl; mix thoroughly by inverting

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes at 10,000x g for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes at 10,000x g for 5 minutes

steps.title: Remove upper phase and transfer to a new 1
steps.instruction: Remove upper phase and transfer to a new 1.5 mL tube
31. Add 6 volumes of ice cold isopropanol and mix by inverting

steps.title: (PAUSE POINT) Place tubes in -20...
steps.instruction: (PAUSE POINT) Place tubes in -20 °C freezer for 15 minutes OR OVERNIGHT/FOR MULTIPLE DAYS

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes in 4 °C at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes in 4 °C at 13,000x g for 20 mins

steps.title: Remove all liquid and let air...
steps.instruction: Remove all liquid and let air dry for 30 mins to over night, until it’s dry to remove excess alcohol

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 30-50 µL of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 30-50 µL of UltraPure water or TE buffer

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 volumes of 3M Sodium Acetate and 3 volumes of ice cold 100% Ethanol to your DNA samples, mix by inverting.

steps.title: Freeze samples at -80° C for...
steps.instruction: Freeze samples at -80° C for 20mins or at -20° C overnight.

steps.title: Centrifuge tubes at 4° C at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tubes at 4° C at max speed for 30 minutes

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend pellet in...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend pellet in 1mL of ice cold 70% Ethanol, being sure the DNA pellet becomes loose from the tube and floats freely in the liquid.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4° C at max speed for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4° C at max speed for 10 minutes

steps.title: Remove Ethanol and let tubes dry...
steps.instruction: Remove Ethanol and let tubes dry completely with no ethanol left in the tubes. Overnight with running air over the open tubes works best.

steps.title: Pre-heat elution buffer (TE or water)...
steps.instruction: Pre-heat elution buffer (TE or water) at 65° C, then re-suspend DNA in 30-50µL of warmed elution buffer

steps.title: Place tube of cell pellet in...
steps.instruction: Place tube of cell pellet in liquid nitrogen to freeze cells, then keep tube in -80 freezer until you are ready to perform the DNA extraction.

steps.title: Place tube in liquid nitrogen to...
steps.instruction: Place tube in liquid nitrogen to flash freeze, and place frozen tube in -80 freezer until you are ready to do the DNA extraction
